hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.cs ]]; then echo "[INFO] C# file modified: $FILE_PATH — remember to run ./build.sh LintAllVerify before committing."; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); STOP_REASON=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".stop_hook_reason // empty"); if [ "$STOP_REASON" = "end_turn" ]; then echo "[REMINDER] If files were modified, run ./build.sh LintAllVerify before committing."; fi; exit 0'
